_defaults.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
_defaults.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Maa Danteshwari Temple
temples.description: A major Shakti shrine and pilgrim centre in Dantewada, closely associated with Bastar Dussehra traditions.

temples.name: Bhoramdeo Temple
temples.description: A historic Shiva temple complex near Kawardha, noted for its medieval temple architecture.

temples.name: Maa Bamleshwari Temple
temples.description: A prominent hilltop Devi temple at Dongargarh and one of Chhattisgarh's best-known pilgrimage sites.

temples.name: Mahamaya Temple, Ratanpur
temples.description: A historic Devi shrine at Ratanpur, traditionally linked with the old Kalachuri capital.

temples.name: Rajiv Lochan Temple
temples.description: A revered Vishnu temple at Rajim, a major pilgrimage town at the confluence of Mahanadi, Pairi and Sondur rivers.
